case_title: GLOBAL LIBERTY INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEW YORK VS. RAVYN RENE MEIGHAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF GLOBAL LIBERTY INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEW YORK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLOBAL LIBERTY INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEW YORK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEIGHAN, RAVYN RENE $4,618.38 PRINCIPAL, $791.12 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,839.50, SEE SCANNED DOC
